title: Build a Cat Painting
description: A CSS art cat face built entirely with positioned div elements. Every feature — ears, eyes, nose, mouth, and whiskers — uses position: absolute relative to the cat-head container. Shapes are formed with border tricks, border-radius, and transform: rotate(). The head itself is centered on the page with position: absolute and margin: auto on all sides.
objectives: Use position: absolute with margin: auto to center an element on the page
Create triangle shapes using transparent borders on three sides
Use border-radius to create oval eye shapes with rotation
Use transform: rotate() to angle whiskers precisely
Layer elements with z-index to control paint order
